protocols.Paper_title: Influenza A Infection of Primary Human Airway Epithelial Cells Up-Regulates Proteins Related to Purine Metabolism and Ubiquitin-Related Signaling
protocols.Evidence: Optimization used washed cells, NP-40/RIPA-type lysis buffers, centrifugation, and soluble fractions assayed by BCA/SDS-PAGE.

protocols.Paper_title: Influenza A Infection of Primary Human Airway Epithelial Cells Up-Regulates Proteins Related to Purine Metabolism and Ubiquitin-Related Signaling
protocols.Evidence: HSU used high-salt detergent-free extraction followed by urea extraction; proteins were digested and subjected to 2DLC-MS/MS.

protocols.Paper_title: Influenza A Infection of Primary Human Airway Epithelial Cells Up-Regulates Proteins Related to Purine Metabolism and Ubiquitin-Related Signaling
protocols.Evidence: Western blot prep treated cells with NP40 buffer; nuclei were pelleted, washed, and lysed with HSU.
